[cron:evening-end 晚休结束] 温柔地叫用户回来工作，看看晚上还有什么需要处理的。
Current time: Friday, March 20th, 2026 — 19:25 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-20 11:25 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: It's time to gently remind the user to return to work and check if there are any tasks that need attention in the evening.

content.text: <final>🌙 晚休结束啦！回来工作吧，看看晚上还有什么需要处理的？😊</final>
